description: Returns all of the Resource Planning Assignment data for the given company

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filters items created on or after the specified date (inclusive). Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: Filters items based on their creation timestamp. Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filters items created on or before the specified date (inclusive). Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: dayRange
parameters.description: A value specifying how many days forward you would like to get assignments for from the specified startDay. Assignments whose start_day falls within the given range will be returned in the response...

parameters.name: page
parameters.description:
This is a **0-based index** representing the page slice of the data you want to retrieve. Each page contains up to **400 items**.
### **📌 Pageable Endpoints** People endpoints that return multiple...

parameters.name: start_day
parameters.description: The starting day to filter assignments by.

parameters.name: updated_after
parameters.description: Filters items updated on or after the specified date (inclusive). Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: updated_at
parameters.description: Filters items based on their last updated timestamp. Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

parameters.name: updated_before
parameters.description: Filters items updated on or before the specified date (inclusive). Accepts an ISO 8601 date string.

possible_pages.description: Total number of pages available based on the query parameters

current_page.description: The current 0-based page index of the returned data

data.description: List of people and their assignments
